trigger_sentence: WHEN E4_CYCLE_SOURCE_HASH APPEARS ON BRANCH_RAW THEN FIRE CYCLE_GATE; WHEN CYCLE_GATE IS OPEN THEN RUN ONE CONTROLLED NETWORK_LANGUAGE_INTERPRETER STEP; WHEN SIGNAL IS WRITTEN THEN ADVANCE E4_LOOP_STATE
network_role: per-cycle trigger surface for a repeated interpreter loop
executor_role: observer and controlled interpreter; not replaced by the network state itself
truth_boundary: E4 cycle source is a network-state trigger target. It gates one interpreter cycle after branch Raw release; it does not execute itself.
